name: Blackened (Cajun) Arctic Char
recipeInstructions:
1. Fillet the Char (fresh or thawed) about 25 mm thick (1-1/2 inches).
2. Don't be afraid to substitute trout, perch, shrimp, or any firm-fleshed seafood or fish for the char.
3. Melt butter in a cast-iron or heavy-bottomed frying pan over medium-high heat.
4. Add Cajun spice and heat thoroughly.
5. Place fillets in pan. Squeeze juice of one lemon into pan.
6. Cook fish for about 5 minutes on each side.
7. Serve with remaining lemon wedges and pan drippings.
